title: 北美监管机构命令 Anthropic 下架两款旗舰大型机型；
description: 上周五，当地监管部门向Anthropic发出正式通知，以跨境数据安全风险为由，要求该公司全面关闭旗下两款最新大型模型《神鬼寓言5》和《神话5》。核心诉求是阻止海外开发者和用户访问模型的核心能力。
titleZh: 北美监管机构命令 Anthropic 下架两款旗舰大型机型；
titleEn: North American regulators order Anthropic to take down two flagship large models; who will benefit from this industry storm?
descriptionZh: 上周五，当地监管部门向Anthropic发出正式通知，以跨境数据安全风险为由，要求该公司全面关闭旗下两款最新大型模型《神鬼寓言5》和《神话5》。核心诉求是阻止海外开发者和用户访问模型的核心能力。
descriptionEn: Last Friday, local regulatory authorities issued an official notice to Anthropic, citing cross-border data security risks, requiring the company to fully shut down its two latest large models, Fable 5 and Mythos 5. The core demand is to prevent overseas developers and users from accessing the models' core capabilities.

title: 尴尬：OpenAI 刚刚发送了 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 来修补地球，但 Codex 却发现了一个致命错误
description: 今天，OpenAI 发布了功能齐全的 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​，以修复全球开源代码中的漏洞。
titleZh: 尴尬：OpenAI 刚刚发送了 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​ 来修补地球，但 Codex 却发现了一个致命错误
titleEn: Awkward: OpenAI Just Sent GPT-5.5-Cyber to Patch the Planet, but Codex Revealed a Fatal Bug
descriptionZh: 今天，OpenAI 发布了功能齐全的 GPT-5.5-Cyber​​，以修复全球开源代码中的漏洞。
descriptionEn: Today, OpenAI unleashed the full-powered GPT-5.5-Cyber to fix vulnerabilities in open-source code worldwide. But right after the announcement, Codex was exposed for an epic bug: writing 640TB in a year, enough to wear out an SSD completely.

title: 去年人形机器人营收仅为82.3万元，Deep Robotics的市销率高于Unitree合理吗？
description: 人形机器人更有可能代表终极形态，承载更宏大的资本叙事。
titleZh: 去年人形机器人营收仅为82.3万元，Deep Robotics的市销率高于Unitree合理吗？
titleEn: Humanoid robot revenue last year was only 823,000 yuan, is it reasonable for Deep Robotics' price-to-sales ratio to be higher than Unitree's?
descriptionZh: 人形机器人更有可能代表终极形态，承载更宏大的资本叙事。
descriptionEn: Humanoid robots are more likely to represent the ultimate form and carry a grander capital narrative. Compared to leading companies like Unitree in this field, Deep Robotics still has a significant gap. In theory, Unitree should command a higher valuation.
